name: @neoli00/memory-memx
description: Compiler-guided, entity-aware long-term memory for OpenClaw agents.

scripts.build: tsdown index.ts --no-config --clean --unbundle --root . --out-dir dist --format esm --target es2023 --platform node --no-treeshake --deps.never-bundle openclaw --deps.never-bundle openclaw/plugin-sdk/core --deps.never-bundle openclaw/plugin-sdk/process-runtime --dts --copy src/search/backends/sentence_transformers_embedder.py
